privileged_info_summary: This task involves setting up a competency-based learning framework in Moodle for the PSY301 Educational Psychology course. The course shortname is PSY301, created with fullname 'Educational Psychology'. The competency framework to be created has shortname 'edu-psych-comp' and fullname 'Educational Psychology Competencies'. Exactly three competencies must be added: 'Learning Theories and Applications', 'Developmental Psychology', and 'Educational Assessment and Measurement'. The framework and competencies must then be linked to the course and to two specific assignments: 'Learning Theories Essay' (linked to 'Learning Theories and Applications') and 'Assessment Design Project' (linked to 'Educational Assessment and Measurement'). The course and assignments are pre-created by the setup scripts; the agent must create the framework and establish the links. All data is synthetically generated for this task environment.
